name: Precedence Pattern Inline With Add Inside
description: x ? a + b — inline pattern's right side is at .RANGE (per parse_pattern). TERM=5 < RANGE=11 so '+' doesn't attach inside. So pattern source is 'a' only; then top loop '+ b' attaches to the Pattern. WILL_FAIL_UNTIL_FIX: probably the inline form should consume the full arithmetic expression.
